narrative:
Buckskin Twp township has 1,193 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
